content: Ok guys so I wanna to try traphas for the first time, can you explain what exactly that is and how do I start?
Well, i can explain you the basics
Much appreciated
But currently it's a bit of a bad timing because there is a team that is quite meta and there is basically no real counterplay against it
If you encounter it, you'll most likely lose without understanding what just happened
As for the basics:
Traphase is divided between 2 gamemodes

- All picks : let you build the team you want but requires you to own the unit + wheel + posse in order to uses them

Dupes doesn't matter, just 1 copy is enough

This one is quite hard for newbies becase generally they don't own a lot so they don't have a lot of option
Hmm I see
Tbh I only want to play traphase to complete the seasonal mission

- Draft picks : you and your opponent are randomly given units + wheels + posse to choose, it's a turn per turn pick up, whoever first pick is randomly assigned too ad will also start first during battle phase

In this game mode there is also some relics popping up that gives effects such as x2 all command cards into your deck or arithmetica limit increase, etc
I see
For draft, generally you can do something like this

- Check relic
- Check units
- Check WoD
- See if there is some combo between units + WoD or units + units
- Sometimes the combo can get bricked by the relic
- Posse are situational, but some are extremely good to have stuff like stagnation 3 pierce or void
- Aim for counterpick, If the enemy take strike based unit then you take para posse stuff like that
- Based on the relic you change your playstyle, for example you got the relic that reshuffle your hand every turns, you discards all of your high cost wheel if you have more than 2 or 3 in starting hand
Although sometimes it doesn't matter because relics RNG can fk you up pretty badly

- For general heads up of traphase :
Each turns let you draw 6 cards, max handsize is 10, but it can be increased by relic effects or wheels, same goes for draws

When setting up your team, the left side is your backrow, the right is front,

You have 5 families you can choose on, blue / purple / green / yellow / red ( i skipped their actual names for simplicity )
Only 4 can be added between them, each family can only use 1 of their units, you can't place for example 2 blue on the same team
It doesn't respect the realm such as caro aequor chaos ultra
Those families can be affiliated to some kind of class but is not defined into them, for example green might be referred as sustain but in some cases can actually DPS
Or blue who is supposed to be tanks can also DPS, it just depends on what wheels or other factors you're giving them
Hm got it, the rule is significantly different I see
Many many thank s for the help man, really appreciate s it
Hope you got lucky on latter collab
Right now, i wouldn't recommend you to play traphase all pick
Like... At all
Because... There something extremely disgusting
Helot team that can one shot any other teams in 2 or 3 turns
Damn
Bring me back beth meta trauma on GT
Before she could do this but there were counters to it so that strat kind of fell off
Knowing each strats seems gonna pain in the ahh, Ig that's mandatory for playing pvp
But recently the devs added arachne's kit in traphase and also buffed helot and buffed the wheels she scale well too while nerfing other teams so it's only helot dominating

Basically before, helot team was easily countered by a posse that have the effect of rewinding your whole team state into previous turn but you get slight debuff with it

Helot team is supposed to one shot everyone, you just defend 1 unit to tank the one shot and then rewind and helot team got bricked
The rewind can rewind death btw
But now...
I see
Arachne have a buff effect that makes helot's damages delayed + directly target HP, so it bypass shields or barriers to protect against the hit
The posse is either nerfednor gone right?
Oh isse
Nope, it's all because of arachne
Also
She indeed busted in anyway possible
That effect makes every damages received by helot delayed too so even if you try to win by killing everyone before the delayed damages arrive
You can't
So ifbyou meet that helot team, you are 100 percent cooked got it
Let me show you
2 turns btw
Literally 2 turns
You see that delayed damages, you just can't tank it, you can't kill helot to trigger the win conditions before the delayed damages arrives
Also i forgot to mention, there is something called mulligan
You basically have the option to discard 0 up to 5 cards shown
They are your starting cards
For the 2nd player, they receive a chest that let you draw 3 cards + gives you 3 arithmetica, contrary to the 1st player who don't have it
I see
Each end turns gives you 1 arithmetica max and increase up to 10
Ngl I think I'm not going to sweat this gamemode because I reall know myself that I'm gonna get cooked no matter how hard I try
I see
I forgot to mention, the opponent saw the stacks, and just surrendered
You just can't counter it
You can't tank it with shield because it's directly targeting your HP
And the damages is above their max HP
Man
So other than helot and arachne, which other two is?
Corposant
Is it must corpo and winkle?
Aequor unit
Yes
Oh I see
So any aequor unit?
Not really
Hmm alrijt
Corpo is the key because she have a card that regen any ally with 30 alienus + enhance buff them
Enhance buff is 25% damages buff
Dam that's quite good
Yeah
As for winkle ?
Have a cost 4 card tha regen every allies with 20 alienus
I see
Also, depending on the situation you can use her card to shield other allies
Some unit have damages targeting highest current HP ( shield count into it too )
Alright got it, too bad the only I don't have is corpo
It helps diverting the damages
I see so she gonna used as bait
Yeah it's good to redirect the damages like that while taunt can't helps you
Got it
Otherwise you just mulligan her cards in general cases
Because you want to draw fast helot's setup to one shot
In turn 2 or 3
Also
Any cards discarded from Mulligan will become last draw cards
Other than that it's just RNG draw for the rest of your deck
I see
Right now, if you want to play traphase
It would be more healthier to play in draft pick
Although beware
It's more RNG because of the relics effect
While in all pick there is no relic
Better than against someone with helot strat ig
Atleast i still have a chance to win

Basically, for the past few ddays after arachne released, it's just helot team winning, either it's helot team vs helot team, or it's helot team winning against any other teams, when helot lose, the player using helot doesn't know how to play it and loses or got extremely unlucky
Most of us if not all agree on current season being absolutely dogshit and is cancerous
In traphase draft pick you don't need to own the wheel + unit + posse so it's why it's more newbie friendly

Because sometimes some unit can carry you as being the DPS or other time combo or unit + unit or unit + wheel carry you

Nope, you're better with different team synergies

nope
you just gotta draft counters/synergies and if possible play into the relic

ok so basically: stall until Arachne exalt, target Helot, set up fatal via Helot, end turn
It's not a true OTK as you need to wait until the end of the opponent's turn but there's no obvious sidedeck beyond "kill Helot"?
It is a true otk
Arachne effect bypass shield and barrier
Enemies spamming shield comp or barrier can't even play against it
The effect directly target HP
And if they don't use barrier or shield then you can just normally play otk helot
It's how braindead dogshit this meta is
Even rewind posse got hard countered by it
Btw, unless there is bug
You can't kill helot buffed by arachne's exalt until the delayed damages comes in
Oh so that's outright guaranteed then
Guaranteed fatal damage and guaranteed invincibility
Yes
I was gonna quibble on it not being an OTK as it allows a response turn
Arachne buffing helot = makes her invincible
So you can't win by trying to kill everyone
That's how stupid it is
Relying on that is technically bug abuse
technically
Not really
It's literally written in the kit
The real bug abuse are damages bypassing it and actually damages helot
Funny isn't it?
<@332573289438380032>  sorry to bother, but are wheels important for the setup? Like im a newbie, and don't have a lot of wheels
Would like to get at least some resources before reset
Quite important, you can replace sorel wheel with kath wheel because it's 3 cost and you can ramp your exalt damages more than 50% if you have the arithmetica
Im pretty sure, i dont have Kath wheel
Pandia's wheel to helps slow the enemies helot or other exalt factors
That exalt if you remove all other effects from it is "pick a character on your team, they are invincible until your next turn"
Ramona wheel to help you get 1 arithmetica +1 draw for better management
And ryker wheel for 20 alienus gain, you can equip it on helot / arachne / corpo depending on your enemy
Stuff like you fight pandia = you equip it on helot
Yeah, it's just damages get converted into delayed, but it doesn't matter if the enemies dies first
You didn't got the other wheels? They should have been free during previous event daily login
Or maybe you weren't there
In that case it's a bit rough
You won't be able to make a good helot team

Salvador because his 120 HP pool is quite tanky and he can stall with barrier regen skills
Goliath because he can self heal with exalt and his ambush cards hurt
Caecus can self heal and counter with exalt
